body.raw:
{
    "name": "Leboncoin Listings Search Export (22)",
    "concurrency": 1,
    "export_unique_results": true,
    "to_complete": false,
    "no_line_breaks": true,
    "params": {
        "max_date": null,
        "max_pages": 1,
        "hours_back": null,
        "max_results": 3,
        "online_shop": true
    }
}

request.description:
These `params` control how the **Leboncoin Listings Search Export** crawler behaves — including pagination, time or date cut-offs, total result limits, and optional shop URL retrieval.

➡️ These parameters are specific to the **Leboncoin Listings Search Export** crawler. _Refer to the_ [Constructing the `params` Object](#13eb068f-2bae-4603-941e-9f36038fb379) _section to understand how to format and apply them._

| Parameter      | Type               | Description                                                                                               |
| -------------- | ------------------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **max_date**   | string (ISO) or null | Stop crawling once a listing older than this date (e.g., `"2025-07-01"`). Leave `null` for no date cutoff. |
| **hours_back** | integer or null     | Collect only listings posted in the last _X_ hours (e.g., `24`). Leave `null` to disable hour-based filtering. |
| **max_pages**  | integer            | How many result pages to crawl (e.g., `1` = first page only).                                             |
| **max_results**| integer            | Total number of listings to collect before stopping (e.g., `3`).                                          |
| **online_shop**| boolean            | If `true`, visits each listing’s pro seller page (if available) to extract the shop URL.                  |

---

### ⚠️ **Additional Notes**

- If both **max_date** and **hours_back** are provided, the crawler will apply **hours_back** first.  
- Leaving **max_date** and **hours_back** both `null` will crawl until **max_results** or **max_pages** is reached.  
- Enabling **online_shop** may add extra requests per listing and increase total run time leading to consumption of extra credits.

response.name: Example

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Leboncoin Listings Search Export (22)",
    "concurrency": 1,
    "export_unique_results": true,
    "to_complete": false,
    "no_line_breaks": true,
    "params": {
        "max_date": null,
        "max_pages": 1,
        "hours_back": null,
        "max_results": 3,
        "online_shop": true
    }
}

request.description:
These `result` objects are returned by the **Leboncoin Listings Search Export** crawler. Each record represents one classified listing.

| **Field** | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **id** | integer | Unique identifier for this result. |
| **object** | string | Always "result". |
| **squid** | string | Hash ID of the squid that produced this result. |
| **run** | string | Hash ID of the run during which this result was scraped. |
| **DPE** | string or null | Energy Performance Diagnostic (e.g., "A", "B", etc.), if available. |
| **DPE_int** | integer or null | Numeric representation of the DPE. |
| **DPE_string** | string or null | Full text description of the DPE rating. |
| **GES** | string or null | Greenhouse Gas Emissions rating (e.g., "A", "B", etc.), if available. |
| **GES_int** | integer or null | Numeric representation of the GES rating. |
| **GES_string** | string or null | Full text description of the GES rating. |
| **ad_type** | string | Type of ad, such as "offer" or "search". |
| **annonce_id** | string | Listing ID assigned by Leboncoin. |
| **api_key** | string | API key used for the request. |
| **area** | string or null | Area size (e.g., in square meters), if specified. |
| **booster** | boolean | `true` if the listing is boosted/promoted. |
| **capacity** | string or null | Equipment capacity or similar metric, if applicable. |
| **category_name** | string | Category of the listing (e.g., "Manutention - Levage"). |
| **charges_included** | boolean or null | `true` if additional charges are included in the price. |
| **city** | string | Name of the city where the listing is located. |
| **city_label** | string | Formatted city label including postal code and area. |
| **continuous_top_ads** | boolean | `true` if the ad is continuously featured at the top of listings. |
| **currency** | string | Currency code used for the price (e.g., "EUR"). |
| **custom_ref** | string or null | Custom reference provided by the user, if any. |
| **department** | string | French department name. |
| **description** | string | Full text description of the listing. |
| **detailed_time** | string or null | Detailed timestamp or scheduling info, if available. |
| **details** | object | Key–value map of structured listing attributes (e.g., “Surface habitable”, “Nombre de pièces”, “Mode de chauffage”, etc.). |
| **district** | string or null | District or arrondissement, if specified. |
| **expiration_date** | string (ISO) | Date and time when the listing expires. |
| **first_publication_date** | string (ISO) | Timestamp when the listing was first published. |
| **floor** | string or null | Floor number for real estate listings, if applicable. |
| **functions** | object or null | Reserved for future function-specific metadata (currently null). |
| **furnished** | boolean or null | `true` if the property is furnished. |
| **gallery** | boolean | `true` if the listing includes a gallery of images. |
| **has_online_shop** | boolean | `true` if a pro seller’s shop URL is available. |
| **has_option** | boolean | `true` if the listing includes additional purchase or rental options. |
| **has_phone** | boolean | `true` if a phone number is available. |
| **has_swimming_pool** | boolean or null | `true` if the property includes a swimming pool. |
| **is_active** | boolean or null | `true` if the listing is currently active. |
| **is_boosted** | boolean | `true` if the listing is boost-promoted. |
| **is_deactivated** | boolean or null | `true` if the listing has been deactivated. |
| **is_detailed** | boolean or null | `true` if detailed listing information was fetched. |
| **is_exclusive** | boolean or null | `true` if the listing is marked as exclusive. |
| **is_mobile** | boolean or null | `true` if the listing was created via mobile. |
| **land_plot_area** | string or null | Area of the land plot, if applicable. |
| **last_publication_date** | string (ISO) | Timestamp of the last publication or update of the listing. |
| **lat** | string | Latitude coordinate of the listing. |
| **lng** | string | Longitude coordinate of the listing. |
| **mail** | string or null | Contact email address, if provided. |
| **more_details** | object | Extended metadata such as import flags, district IDs, old price, lease type, floor number, energy rate, inventory fees, and other vendor-specific fields. |
| **native_id** | integer | Native numeric ID for the listing, often matches `id`. |
| **no_salesmen** | boolean | `true` if the listing specifies “no salesmen” policy. |
| **online_shop_url** | string or null | URL of the seller’s online shop, if available. |
| **owner_name** | string | Name of the listing’s owner or seller. |
| **owner_siren** | string or null | Seller’s SIREN identifier (French business registration number). |
| **owner_store_id** | string | Identifier of the seller’s store. |
| **owner_type** | string | Numeric code representing the seller type. |
| **phone** | string or null | Phone number listed in the ad, if provided. |
| **phone_from_user** | string or null | Phone number extracted from user input, if any. |
| **photosup** | boolean | `true` if supplementary photos are provided. |
| **picture** | string (URL) | URL of the primary listing image. |
| **pictures** | string | Comma-separated URLs of all listing images. |
| **postal_code** | string | Postal code for the listing’s location. |
| **price** | integer | Listing price. |
| **price_per_square_meter** | number or null | Price per square meter, if computed. |
| **real_estate_type** | string or null | Type of real estate (e.g., apartment, house), if applicable. |
| **ref** | string or null | Internal reference code, if any. |
| **region** | string | Region name (e.g., "Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur"). |
| **room_count** | integer or null | Number of rooms, if specified. |
| **scraping_time** | string (ISO) | Timestamp when this listing was fetched by the scraper. |
| **sleepingroom_count** | integer or null | Number of sleeping rooms, if specified. |
| **source** | string | Data source for the listing (e.g., "city", "pro"). |
| **square_metter_price** | number or null | Price per square meter computed for real estate listings. |
| **status_code** | string or null | Status code of the listing (e.g., active, pending). |
| **sub_toplist** | boolean | `true` if the ad appears in a secondary top-list position. |
| **title** | string | Title or headline of the listing. |
| **urgent** | boolean | `true` if the listing is marked as urgent. |
| **url** | string (URL) | Direct link to the listing on leboncoin.fr. |
| **user_id** | string | UUID of the user who posted the listing. |
